detaileddescription.para: Sets the logged-in user.
Reduces the time spent reading by a given duration and updates the UI accordingly.
Creates a visual representation of a book as a box within a given container.

inbodydescription.para: Handles text change events before they occur.
Updates notes in the database when text changes.
Handles text changes in an editable field.

detaileddescription.para: Clears all views from the given LinearLayout container.
Updates the reading time based on the number of pages read and displays it in the specified TextView.
Displays the login screen and handles user login attempts.
Displays the registration screen and sets up event listeners for user interactions.

This method switches the main activity's content view to the registration layout, initializes UI components, and registers click listeners for the register button and the switch-to-login button. When the register button is clicked, it calls MainActivity#handleRegister(EditText, EditText, EditText, EditText) to process user input and register a new account. If an exception occurs during this process, it throws a runtime exception. Similarly, when the switch-to-login button is clicked, it attempts to show the login screen by calling showLogin(), handling exceptions in the same manner.
Navigates to the stats page, initializes views, sets up navigation listeners, and loads chart data asynchronously.
Navigates to the starting page, updating the UI and loading user data in the background.

inbodydescription.para: Animates a change in RecyclerView item position if within a small threshold.
Pauses or resumes image loading based on the scroll state of the RecyclerView.

detaileddescription.para: Navigates to the details page of a selected book.

This method sets up the UI for displaying detailed information about a book, including its title, author, description, number of pages, genre, and rating. It also handles user interactions such as navigating to other sections of the app, updating the reading status of the book, and initiating AI-based recommendations.

parameterdescription.para: The Book object containing details about the book to be displayed.

detaileddescription.para: Handles the display and functionality of the list search interface, including animations and filtering books based on user input.

inbodydescription.para: Filters books based on the search query and selected author/genre.
Filters books based on the query text, author selection, and genre selection.

detaileddescription.para: Fills spinners with authors and genres from the logged-in user, adding a default "All" option.
Navigates to and sets up the Goals screen, allowing users to view, add, and manage their reading goals.

This method performs several key tasks:
Sets the content view to the Goals activity layout.
Initializes and configures a RecyclerView to display goal items.
Adds click listeners for buttons that switch between displaying current, completed, and failed goals.
Configures an AlertDialog with options to edit or delete selected goals.
Handles adding new goals through user input, including validation of fields and database operations.

parameterdescription.para: The MainActivity instance that calls this method, used for accessing resources, context, and user data.

inbodydescription.para: Toggles visibility of book and number views based on selected item.
Placeholder method called when nothing is selected.
Hides the pop-up and shows the add goal button, then clears input fields.
Handles the repeat event of an animation.

detaileddescription.para: Navigates to the settings screen and sets up the UI elements and their corresponding listeners.

This method is responsible for:
Setting the content view to the main settings layout.
Initializing various UI components such as buttons, text views, switches, and time pickers.
Configuring listeners for UI events, including button clicks and changes in switch states.
Handling user interactions for changing passwords, deleting accounts, changing usernames, changing emails, and configuring notification settings.

parameterdescription.para: if an error occurs during asynchronous execution.
if the current thread is interrupted.

inbodydescription.para: Dismisses the given dialog when an option is clicked.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the database connection for this instance.
Creates and returns an ImageButton that, when clicked, calls saveBook with the given book.
Creates and configures an ImageButton to remove a specified book.
Initializes the bar chart view by finding it in the main activity layout.

Sets up click listeners for navigation buttons in the main activity. Each button is associated with a different navigation action:
Home button navigates to the starting page.
Search button triggers a search operation handled by the main activity.
Goals button navigates to the goals page.
Settings button navigates to the settings page.
Asynchronously loads and displays chart data using AsyncTask.

inbodydescription.para: Fetches reading time and completed books data for a user and returns it as ChartData.
Handles post-execution tasks, either setting up the chart with data or showing an error message.

detaileddescription.para: Sets up the bar chart with reading time data in hours.
Filters out invalid BarEntry objects based on specific criteria.

This method iterates through a list of BarEntry objects and checks each entry's year-month value. It ensures that the year is between 2000 and 2030 and the month is within the range of 1 to 12. Only entries meeting these conditions are added to the validEntries list, which is then returned.

parameterdescription.para: List of BarEntry objects to be filtered

detaileddescription.para: Converts a list of BarEntries from minutes to hours.
Configures the X and Y axes of a bar chart.
Configures the chart with default settings and animations.
Displays the total reading time by summing up entries and updating a TextView.
Displays a short toast message indicating failure to load reading statistics.
Sets up the navigation buttons with their respective click listeners.
Filters books based on title, author, and genre queries.

This method iterates over a map of book views and their corresponding Book objects. It checks if each book matches the provided title query, author, and genre filters. If a book meets all criteria, its view is set to visible; otherwise, it is hidden.
Creates a styled button with specified text and click listener.
Toggles the visibility of a RelativeLayout with an animated scale effect.
